summary: FOMO OS Web platform E2E testing completed. Backend: 19/20 endpoints passed (95%). Frontend: All 5 Fractal tabs + Exchange + Tech Analysis pages working correctly with real data. No paywall blocking admin@fomo.ai. All 8 sections visible on Overview page. Charts rendering with candles AND predicted lines. Sidebar shows all 10 modules.

minor_issues.issue: Response structure differs slightly from expected (has all required fields but test validation was too strict)
minor_issues.impact: None - endpoint returns all required data (symbol, direction, confidence, signals)
minor_issues.note: Endpoint is working correctly, test validation needs adjustment

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ui/overview?asset=btc&horizon=90 returns verdict, reasons, risks, indicators, pipeline, horizons, meta, candles, charts.actual + charts.predicted
Backend: GET /api/news/feed?limit=10 returns ok=true with non-empty data.clusters
Backend: GET /api/deep/stats returns counts.deep_projects > 0
Backend: GET /api/tech-analysis/BTC returns real OKX data with action/trend/momentum
Backend: GET /api/fractal/runtime/BTC returns direction/phase/confidence
Backend: GET /api/exchange/overview returns ok=true with items array of real OKX data
Backend: GET /api/fractal/match, /api/fractal/signal, /api/fractal/spx all return ok=true
Backend: GET /api/ui/fractal/dxy/overview returns ok=true with asset=DXY
Backend: GET /api/ui/brain/decision returns ok=true
Backend: GET /api/ta-engine/mtf/BTC?timeframes=4H,1D,7D,30D returns tf_map with candles
Backend: GET /api/meta-brain-v2/signals returns 5 module signals (ta, sentiment, fractal, exchange, onchain)
Backend: GET /api/meta-brain-v2/modules returns 5 modules with active status
Backend: GET /api/fractal/v2.1/focus-pack returns forecasts + candles
Backend: GET /api/ui/candles returns candles array
Backend: GET /api/sentiment/overview returns direction + confidence
Backend: GET /api/market/candles returns OHLC data
Backend: GET /api/market/state returns macro + indicators + coreInsight
Frontend: /fractal?tab=overview shows BULLISH verdict + 30% confidence + LivePredictionChart with candles AND predicted line + Reasons + Risks + Indicators sections
Frontend: /fractal?tab=btc shows BTC NEUTRAL verdict + confidence 4% + risk HIGH + phase RANGEBOUND + chart with Synthetic/Replay/Hybrid/BTC∧SPX tabs + What Would Change This View section
Frontend: /fractal?tab=spx page loads correctly
Frontend: /fractal?tab=dxy page loads correctly
Frontend: /fractal?tab=brain page loads correctly
Frontend: /exchange shows FINAL DECISION (NO TRADE) + Leverage 0.00x + Confidence 0% + Stability 100% + Macro Context (CAPITAL EXIT) + Impact Analysis + Allocation breakdown (STABLE 100%)
Frontend: /tech-analysis shows Trading Terminal with BTCUSDT candle chart + support/resistance levels + State (Macro: Neutral, Mid-term: Developing, Short-term: Consolidation) + Core Insight
Frontend: Sidebar shows all 10 modules (Alpha, Fractal, Exchange, On-chain, Sentiment, Tech Analysis, Prediction, Telegram, Alerts, Settings)
Frontend: All 5 Fractal tabs are clickable and functional (Overview, Bitcoin, SPX, DXY, Macro Brain)
Frontend: No paywall blocking admin@fomo.ai user
Frontend: No React errors or infinite loading states
Frontend: Charts render correctly with real data (not empty)
Frontend: Predicted forecast lines visible on charts (green projection lines)
